name: Marketing Miner MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Marketing Miner — a keyword research and SEO analytics tool with specialization in Central and Eastern European (CEE) and English-language markets. Enables AI agents to discover high-impact keyword ideas, analyze search volumes, and research SEO opportunities for content and marketing strategy agents.
use_cases: Discovering keyword opportunities for CEE and English markets from SEO agents
Analyzing search volume trends for content strategy agents
Building keyword research datasets for AI-driven content planning workflows
Researching competitor keyword gaps from marketing intelligence agents
not_for: Teams focused on non-CEE/non-English markets without Marketing Miner coverage
Real-time rank tracking (batch keyword research focus)
Teams with existing SEMrush or Ahrefs workflows (overlap in functionality)
best_when: A content marketer or SEO specialist targeting Central and Eastern European markets (Czech, Slovak, Polish, Hungarian, etc.) or English-language markets wants AI agents to do keyword research — especially strong for CEE market coverage.
avoid_when: Your primary markets are in Asia, LATAM, or MENA where Marketing Miner coverage is weaker. For global SEO, Ahrefs or SEMrush may be better alternatives.

auth.notes: Marketing Miner API key required. Marketing Miner subscription needed for API access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier for API access; Marketing Miner has subscription plans
pricing.paid_tiers: Marketing Miner subscription plans with varying API credits
pricing.notes: Marketing Miner is a paid SEO tool. MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: Marketing Miner API credits consumed per request; varies by plan

known_agent_gotchas: Marketing Miner API credits are consumed per request — agents should batch efficiently
CEE market specialization is a differentiator but limits global market coverage
Keyword research results depend on data freshness — check how current the data is
Community MCP implementation — test against your Marketing Miner API version
agent_readiness.security_notes: Marketing Miner API key must be secured. SEO data is not sensitive but credit consumption should be monitored. EU-based service.

security_score_components.security_notes: API key security. Low-sensitivity SEO data. EU-based service. Monitor credit consumption.
